ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flow_data" (
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flow data point */,
  "std" REAL /* Standard deviation of the flow rate */,
  "avg_flow" REAL /* Average flow rate */,
  "dif_flow_id_day_week" REAL /* Difference in flow rate over the day of the week */,
  "dif_flow_id_day_week_hour_day" REAL /* Difference in flow rate over the day of the week and hour of the day */,
  "sig_dif_flow_id_day_week" REAL /* Significant difference in flow rate over the day of the week */,
  "sig_dif_flow_id_day_week_hour_day" REAL /* Significant difference in flow rate over the day of the week and hour of the day */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Date ID for the flow data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was inserted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  "flow_rate_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the flow rate (e.g., m3/s, L/s) */,
  "flow_type" TEXT /* Type of flow (e.g., water, wastewater) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id", "date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flow_ids" (
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flow ID */,
  "flow_name" TEXT /* Name of the flow ID */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flow ID */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the flow ID (e.g., city, state, country) */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the flow ID (e.g., company, organization) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flow ID was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flow ID was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the flow data point */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "hour_of_day" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (e.g., 0, 1, ..., 23) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flow data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the flow data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the flow data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("flow_id") REFERENCES flow_data ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flow_data_calculations" (
  "calculation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calculation */,
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flow data being calculated */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Date ID for the flow data being calculated */,
  "calculation_type" TEXT /* Type of calculation (e.g., average, standard deviation) */,
  "value" REAL /* Calculated value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the calculation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the calculation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calculation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flow_data_calculations_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("flow_id") REFERENCES flow_data ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flow_data_calculations_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flow_data_anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flow data with the anomaly */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Date ID for the flow data with the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly (e.g., high flow rate, low flow rate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the anomaly (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the anomaly was detected */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the anomaly was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flow_data_anomalies_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flow_data_anomalies_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("flow_id") REFERENCES flow_data ("flow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flow_data_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flow data with the trend */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Date ID for the flow data with the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing flow rate, decreasing flow rate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend was detected */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flow_data_trends_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("flow_id") REFERENCES flow_data ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flow_data_trends_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
